description: Create field extractions for the `apache_error` sourcetype in the `web_logs` index: 'error_severity' (extracting the severity keyword from the second bracket group) and 'log_client_ip' (extracting the client IP address from the `[client X.X.X.X]` pattern). Build and save a report named 'Apache_Error_Analysis' that provides a statistical breakdown using these extracted fields from the `web_logs` index. The Splunk interface is available at http://localhost:8000 (username: admin, password: SplunkAdmin1!).
